goal: Final QA: the booking feature (/book owner, /bookings workshop) is reachable from the UI; production build passes; review CRITICAL/HIGH resolved.
why: Final-QA audit (HAND-09) found one HIGH: the M4 booking feature builds but is unreachable from UI navigation. Production build passes, 0 CRITICAL, security boundary clean. This phase resolves the navigation-wiring HIGH.
success_criteria: /book reachable from owner sidebar nav; /bookings reachable from workshop surface.
EL/EN parity preserved (new nav label in both locales); Translation type compiles.
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0 and npx next build compiles.
No CRITICAL/HIGH remaining from the Final-QA audit (booking-reachability HIGH closed).

tasks.title: Wire the booking feature into navigation
acceptance_criteria: Owner sidebar shows a Booking nav item (calendar icon) routing to /book via router.push.
Workshop MechanicLog has a visible link to /bookings alongside /register.
nav.book added to both el and en locales; EL/EN parity preserved.
npx tsc --noEmit exits 0; npx next build compiles.
tasks.action: Add 'book' to NavKey + navItems (calendar icon) in src/lib/data.ts; extend nav type + add book label to both locale nav objects in src/lib/i18n.ts; add a book->/book router.push branch in AppShell.select; add a <Link href="/bookings"> in MechanicLog header near the /register link reusing an existing bookings i18n key or adding one to both locales.
